category_sources: source_facts.description says CLI calendar application; official GitHub README describes khal as a CLI and terminal calendar program that synchronizes with CalDAV via vdirsyncer.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name are khal; official GitHub repository is pimutils/khal.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README says khal documentation is on Read the Docs; search result for khal.readthedocs.io is the dedicated docs site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage points to project homepage, and official GitHub result identifies pimutils/khal as the khal source repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables indicate CLI calendar; official GitHub README mentions CalDAV synchronization and terminal calendar usage.
